name: attempt_id
description: Unique identifier for this processing attempt. Primary key.

name: hand_setup_id
description: hand_setups.hand_setup_id being processed. Foreign key to hand_setups.hand_setup_id.

name: status
description: Outcome of this attempt: 'complete' | 'complete_skipped' | 'failed_transient' | 'failed_permanent'. 'complete_skipped' means a precondition check failed and no LLM calls were made; no hand_starts row is written for this status. No in-flight states. NOT enforced as an enum by BigQuery — validation lives in application code.

name: status_message
description: Free-form error, skip-reason, or status detail. Typically populated on failure or skip to capture the reason. NULL on success.

name: attempted_at
description: Timestamp when this attempt was recorded. Auto-populated on insert via DEFAULT.
